untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) initial breakout of support/resistance with volume confirmation, (2) specific pullback retracement percentage thresholds (not available in indicator set), (3) pullback closure through broken level (requires multi-bar state tracking), and (4) risk-to-reward ratio calculation for exits. Pivot points used as proxy for S/R levels, but the core pullback confirmation logic and retracement thresholds cannot be precisely translated without custom indicators or state variables.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using pivot points (s1/r1) as support/resistance proxies and hvol_20 for volume confirmation, but critical pullback retracement logic (e.g., 0.382-0.618 Fibonacci levels) and the multi-bar confirmation sequence are not expressible with allowed indicators. This rule requires either custom indicator definitions or a more sophisticated state machine than simple 3-field conditions.
